_doc: SRD 5.2.1 magic-item attunement rules. A creature can be attuned to at most three magic items at a time; attunement requires a short rest spent focusing on the item.
ends_when: creature no longer satisfies the item's requirement
more than 100 ft from the item for 24 hours
another creature attunes to the item
voluntarily ended at end of a short rest
